body:
This PR improves the Lobby visual experience with lightweight UI animations and a new animated background video for the Rogue Mode card.

Changes include:
- Add subtle Lobby UI animations and transitions
- Improve hover glow and visual feedback on Lobby cards
- Add animated Rogue Mode background video using `lobbyBackground-1.mp4`
- Reuse the existing video-card structure from Solo PvE
- Preserve existing Lobby layout and responsive behavior
- Keep all gameplay, API, socket, and backend logic unchanged

No backend, database, API, or gameplay logic changes were made.

Verified locally with responsive viewport testing and `npm run build`.

这个 PR 对 Lobby 页面进行了视觉增强，包括轻量动画效果以及 Rogue Mode 动态背景视频。

改动包括：
- 增加 Lobby 页面轻量 UI 动画与过渡效果
- 优化卡片 hover glow 与交互反馈
- 为 Rogue Mode 卡片增加动态背景视频 `lobbyBackground-1.mp4`
- 复用现有 Solo PvE 的视频背景结构
- 保持当前 Lobby 布局与响应式行为稳定
- 不修改 gameplay、API、socket 或 backend 逻辑

本次改动未修改：
- backend
- database
- API
- gameplay logic

已通过本地响应式测试与 `npm run build` 验证。
title: feat(lobby): add animations and rogue background video
